DEISM
  • DEISM Documentation
  • View page source

DEISM Documentation

DEISM is a Python package for room-acoustics simulation with directivity-aware source and receiver models. The current documentation is organized around the class-based workflow implemented by deism.core_deism.DEISM.

Start here

  • Introduction for the project scope and published references

  • Installation for environment setup and verification

  • Quickstart for the shortest working class-based runs

  • Workflows for shoebox versus convex execution order

  • Parameter Dependencies for update-order and rerun rules

Quick Links

  • Academic publications - Jump to all publications

  • Main Paper - Main JASA paper

  • Directivity Formulation - Directivity formulation paper

  • Arbitrary Geometries - Arbitrary geometries paper
